content: --deep Provide more information about Polymarket 60-day forecast for the gold

args.thought: User wants deeper analysis on the Polymarket 60-day gold forecast. The previous response covered the basics (current price, market probabilities, signal breakdown). To add value, I need to: (1) fetch fresh Polymarket data to ensure probabilities are current, (2) get current gold price for accurate baseline, (3) explore additional macro drivers not yet covered (real yields, dollar index, central bank buying), (4) check if there are additional Polymarket markets I missed, (5) synthesize a more granular probability distribution for the 60-day price range.

Also, the Polymarket data I have is mostly end-of-March and end-of-June binaries. For a 60-day forecast (from March 29, 2026 = ~May 28, 2026), I need to interpolate between these markets or search for more specific May expiry markets. Let me fetch current gold price first.
